issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: println("🔧 DEBUG: Scheduled $frequency backup at ${String.format("%02d:%02d", hour, minute)}")

issue.message: Do not hardcode "`/data/`"; use `Context.getFilesDir().getPath()` instead
Do not hardcode "`/data/`"; use `Context.getFilesDir().getPath()` instead
Attribute `enableOnBackInvokedCallback` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 31)
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 31)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
Call to `CredentialManager.getCredential` without use of `NoCredentialException`
Use of `:googleid` classes without use of `GoogleIdTokenCredential`
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details

Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
